creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 242492
patch v1

Hi,

XFCE has released version 1.0.00 of the generic slider plugin, making it available as an official plugin.

I have updated the port accordingly, making it similar to the other plugins now that it is properly distributed with precompiled configure script and translations.

Can you approve this update?

I'd also like to ask you if you'd consider moving maintainership to xfce@ like other plugins. You can maintain implicit commit rights to this port.

Thanks in advance!
